prerequisites.value: Wis 15, Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Indomitable Mountain Style, base attack bonus +6.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever an opponent succeeds at a combat maneuver against you or at an Acrobatics check to avoid provoking an attack of opportunity when moving through a square you threaten, you immediately gain a +2 morale bonus to your CMD against the next combat maneuver against you or to the DC of the next Acrobatics check to avoid an attack of opportunity when moving through a square you threaten. This bonus stacks until either attempt fails against you.
